name: React Native (Expo)
description: React Native with Expo managed workflow, TypeScript, Zustand, TanStack Query, and NativeWind
conventions: Use Expo managed workflow — never eject unless an absolute requirement demands it
TypeScript strict mode is required — no any types, no @ts-ignore comments
Zustand for all global client state — no Redux, no Context API for shared state
TanStack Query (React Query) for all server state — no manual fetch/useEffect data patterns
NativeWind for styling — no StyleSheet.create, no inline style objects for layout
Navigation with Expo Router (file-based routing in app/ directory) — not react-navigation manually configured
Always wrap root content in SafeAreaView from react-native-safe-area-context
Platform-specific code in .ios.tsx / .android.tsx files — not Platform.select() inline
Use expo-image instead of React Native's Image component for better caching and performance
Error boundaries at the screen level — wrap each screen in an ErrorBoundary
Test with Jest + React Native Testing Library — test behavior not implementation
Keyboard handling via KeyboardAvoidingView — never manual keyboard height calculations
Use expo-constants for environment config — never hardcode API URLs or keys
Animations with react-native-reanimated — never Animated API from core React Native
